name: ITCS205 Finals Topic 2 - Fundamentals of SQL

questions.questionText: SQL data types for exact numeric.
questions.answer: bigint, bit, decimal, int, money, numeric

questions.questionText: SQL data types for approximate numeric.
SQL data types for date and time.
A process that assigns attributes to entities so that data redundancies are reduced or eliminated.

Objectives of Normalization:
- Each table/relation represents a ________________.

Objectives of Normalization:
- Each row/column intersection contains only __________ and not a _____________.

Objectives of Normalization:
- No data item will be __________________ in more than one table.
In 1NF, the first step is Removing _________ and ____________.
Usually in tables with a multiple-field primary key (composite key).
Usually used in tables with a single-field primary key. Records do not have fields that depend on other non-key fields, everything depends only on the main ID.
Usually used to split into single values in each cell and no duplicate rows.
